name: Viral Video Script Generator
description: Generate viral short-form video scripts using Claude AI with trend analysis. Produces attention-grabbing scripts optimized for virality, complete with hooks, CTAs, and trending format suggestions, then tracks everything in Google Sheets.

source.originalName: Generate AI viral videos with VEO 3 and upload to TikTok

topic.description: Topic or trend to create viral video scripts about (e.g. 'AI tools for students', 'morning routines')

scriptCount.description: Number of viral scripts to generate (1-5)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post results

steps.name: Research trending content in the topic via Exa
Build AI prompt for viral script generation
Run Claude AI to generate viral scripts
Prepare data for Google Sheets tracking
Save viral scripts to Google Sheets
